entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millspaugh Maesen, the target crop for genetic enhancement of seed protein

entities.name: SEED PROTEIN
entities.description: The protein content in the seeds of the crop, targeted for genetic enhancement

entities.name: PROTEIN-ENERGY MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A widespread social issue characterized by insufficient protein availability

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region where protein-energy malnutrition is a widespread issue

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where protein-energy malnutrition is a widespread issue

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: A group of crops known for their high-protein grains

entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: A group of crops including pigeonpea, targeted for protein enhancement

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-arid Tropics, the organization that bred high-protein pigeonpea cultivars

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing high-protein pigeonpea cultivars using wild species as donors

entities.name: WILD SPECIES
entities.description: Plants used as protein donors to enhance protein content in pigeonpea

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the crop, measured in kg ha-1

entities.name: WISTAR MALE RATS
entities.description: Animals used for the biological assessment of protein quality

entities.name: PROTEIN DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: A measure of the proportion of protein that is digested and absorbed

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL VALUE
entities.description: A measure of the efficiency with which the diet protein is used for growth

entities.name: NET PROTEIN UTILIZATION
entities.description: A measure of the proportion of dietary protein retained by the body

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: Knowledge and technologies used to assist in achieving nutritional food security

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of ensuring adequate protein and nutritional supplies for the population
